claim: Verifier confirms that explorer and cross-checker evidence is complete, properly sourced, and contains no assumptions promoted to facts. All 30 evidence records are project-scoped with verifiable file paths and line numbers. Evidence agreement is pass with no conflicts. PRD readiness blockers for evidence agents are now resolved.

evidence.summary: Evidence dispatch code implements boundary snapshot detection, missing data sanitization, provider normalization, and blocker injection for PRD readiness.
evidence.why: Core implementation code for provider isolation and boundary detection.

evidence.summary: Provider adapter implements separate code paths for Claude, Codex, and custom providers with provider-specific argument construction.
Evidence agent protocols and conflict detection logic defined.
Test coverage validates provider isolation, boundary violation detection, git-backed mutations, and agent conflict handling.
Agent adapter contract validation for sandbox safety and budget enforcement.

risks: Real Claude -p agents may behave differently than test mocks, potentially exposing gaps in boundary detection or provider normalization.
Non-git repos with large file trees may experience slow boundary detection due to full filesystem walk.
Custom provider commands could theoretically bypass boundary if invoked without harness supervision.

result.notes: Evidence verification complete. Explorer provided 20 evidence records, cross-checker independently verified 10 records with no conflicts. All evidence is project-scoped with verifiable paths and line numbers. No assumptions promoted to facts. No missing data unresolved. Evidence agreement status is pass. PRD readiness blockers for explorer, cross-checker, and verifier are now resolved. Demand is PRD-ready for real Claude -p agent stress testing.
